suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether compiler-worker startup reads for mission `AGENTS.md`, `.factory/services.yaml`, and relevant `.factory/library/*.md` may be satisfied by another required startup skill, or require transcript-visible reads / deviation reporting when they are omitted before code edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewer for fix feature `misc-typed-lambda-value-check-without-rechecking` observed that worker session `d52a477e-30b0-4fb5-b0f3-6349c9bf6418` edited `lib/typecheck.ml` after reading mission metadata but without transcript-visible reads of mission `AGENTS.md`, repo `.factory/services.yaml`, or `.factory/library/*.md`, even though `.factory/skills/compiler-worker/SKILL.md` currently requires those reads before code changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: The reviewer repeated the compiler-worker tests-first sequencing concern for `misc-typed-lambda-value-check-without-rechecking`.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the existing round-4 suggested guidance update about tests-first sequencing already recorded in synthesis.json before this rerun.
